incidents.incidents.addAnApiKeyIn: Add an API key in settings to unlock model selection and incident chat.

incidents.incidents.describeTheSecurityI: Describe the security issue to investigate…
incidents.incidents.noIncidentsYetCreate: No incidents yet. Create one to get started.
